[EN](https://www.valueresearchonline.com/) [हि](https://hindi.valueresearchonline.com/?utm_source=lang-switch&utm_medium=vro-toggle-button&utm_campaign=vro-navigation)
 ... 
Section Title: Resumption of subscription in overseas schemes of Nippon India Mutual Fund
Content:
Nippon India Mutual Fund has announced resumption of subscription in its international funds, with effect from ****March 18, 2026**** . Investors can now invest in the following schemes through lumpsum, switch-ins, and new SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) or STP (Systematic Transfer Plan) registrations, subject to a maximum investment limit of ₹5 lakh per PAN per month:
Nippon India Japan Equity Fund
Nippon India Taiwan Equity Fund
New investments in these schemes were first suspended temporarily on October, 2024, due to overseas investment limits prescribed for mutual fund industry. However, when SEBI later allowed mutual funds to resume investments if there is a headroom available, the AMC had removed gates to make use of the available limit time and again.
Ask Value Research
No question is too small. Share your queries on personal finance, mutual funds, or stocks and let us simplify things for you.
 ...

March has more crises than days A World Cup win, a war, oil at $119, drones on refineries, a bank chairman's exit and the month isn't over. The morning panic still belongs to borrowed-money investors, not you.
The wait is the work Why the most painful stretches of a SIP are often the most productive
The oldest disruption in the book Every oil shock looks permanent at the time. None of them has been.

 ... 
Section Title: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund discontinues subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
SECTIONS
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund discontinues subscription in its 3 international funds
By
Surbhi Khanna
, ET Online Last Updated: Mar 01, 2026, 10:38:00 AM IST
Rate Story
[](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes)
[Follow us](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
Share
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Medium
Abc Large
Save
Print
Comment
Synopsis
ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund announces discontinuation of subscription in its three international funds with effect from March 2.

Section Title: ... > What's Included
Content:
Exclusive Stories
Daily ePaper Access
Smart Market Tools
Curated Investment Ideas
Ad-lite Experience
Subscription
ETMarkets.com
[ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/icici-prudential-mutual-fund/mutual_funds_search/amcid-14.cms) announces discontinuation of subscription in its three international funds with effect from March 2. The three international funds are - ICICI Prudential US Bluechip Equity Fund , ICICI Prudential Nasdaq 100 Index Fund , ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Funds.
The fund house informed about this discontinuation to its unitholders through a notice cum addendum.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Live Events
Content:
The AMC may resume acceptance of subscriptions in the aforesaid schemes in the event of availability of limits or enhancements of limits or issuance of any clarification by SEBI/AMFI in this regard.
Redemptions and/or switch-outs including existing STP-Out and/or Systematic Withdrawal Plan (SWP) registered under any mode/facility for redeeming/ switching out from the Scheme shall be continued.
In January 2026, the fund house resumed subscriptions in these three international funds with effect from January 27 and the fresh/additional purchases through lumpsum mode, switch into the schemes, Systematic Investment Plan and/or Systematic Transfer Plan (cumulative for all frequencies) were capped at Rs 2 lakhs per PAN per month per scheme level.
Section Title: ... > Live Events
Content:
Also Read | [ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund resumes subscription in its 3 international funds with cap of Rs 2 lakh](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mf/mf-news/icici-prudential-mutual-fund-resumes-3-international-schemes-caps-investment-at-rs-2-lakh/articleshow/127112843.cms)
In July 2025, the fund house announced resuming subscription in these three international funds through any of the modes such as Lump sum mode (including switches), Systematic Investment Plan and/or Systematic Transfer Plan registration (target scheme).
The restrictions were imposed after Sebi asked [mutual funds](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mutual-funds) to stop fresh subscriptions in overseas ETFs as the $1 billion investment limit was about to get breached.
*(* *Disclaimer* *: Recommendations, suggestions, views and opinions given by the experts are their own. These do not represent the views of The Economic Times)*
Addas a Reliable and Trusted News Source

Section Title: ICICI Pru Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Fund (G) > ... > Category > Investment Objective
Content:
ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity Fund of Fund (the Scheme) is an open-ended fund of fund scheme that invests in the units/shares of First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund. The Scheme may also invest a certain portion of its corpus in domestic debt or money market securities and/or debt mutual fund schemes/liquid schemes of domestic mutual funds including that of ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund, in order to meet liquidity requirements from time to time. However, there can be no assurance that the investment objective of the Scheme will be realized.

Section Title: ... > ## Fund house & investment objective
Content:
ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Priyanka Khandelwal is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,87,232 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 20 Aug 2025 is ₹18.80.
The ICICI Prudential Strategic Metal and Energy Equity FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year. ;
